free_text: Study of proton- and deuteron-induced spallation
reactions on the long-lived fission product 93Zr at
JEin Institute for Fundamental Science, NPO
Main reference. See also TITLE and AUTHOR.
Secondary beams were produced from in-flight
fission of a 238U on a 3 mm thick Be target.
